keyChange: Fee schedule amended to reflect a singular rate for rentals instead of having a separate rate for residents vs non-residents

categories.name: Town Facilities & Recreation Rentals
categories.description: Exclusive rental is based on hourly rate and subject to availability. All reservations for 100 or more people require a special event application.

subcategories.name: Community Building
subcategories.note: All rentals require a two-hour minimum. Refundable Deposit is $150.00. Renting Party is responsible for leaving building and grounds clean and returning all keys before deposit is refunded.

subcategories.name: Shelter Rentals
subcategories.note: Unsecured and open to the public. Unless exclusive rentals are secured, managed first-come-first-served with no charge.

subcategories.name: Rock Ridge Frisbee Golf
subcategories.note: Unsecured and open to the public unless exclusive rentals are secured.

fees.item: Closed Course - Half Day (5 hours or less)
Closed Course - Full Day (more than 5 hours)

subcategories.name: Athletic Rentals (per court)
subcategories.note: Unsecured and open to the public unless exclusive rentals are secured.

subcategories.name: Multipurpose Fields (per field)
subcategories.note: Unsecured and open to the public unless exclusive rentals are secured.

subcategories.name: Event Open Space Field at Knight Farm Park

categories.name: Residential Solid Waste & Recycling
categories.note: Customers in new residential dwellings pay pro-rated relative to months remaining in the calendar year.
